groq_prompt:
You are looking at 3 sequential frames from a pickleball match showing a single shot.

Identify the shot from this list:
- dink: soft shot played at the kitchen line, lands in the opponent's kitchen
- drive: hard low fast shot
- drop: third-shot drop, soft shot from baseline that lands in the kitchen
- serve: opening underhand shot from baseline
- volley: hit before bounce, usually at the kitchen line
- lob: high arcing defensive shot over opponent
- smash: overhead attacking shot

Respond in EXACTLY this format, nothing else:
SHOT: <one of: dink|drive|drop|serve|volley|lob|smash|unknown>
CONFIDENCE: <number from 0.0 to 1.0>
